evals.prompt: Turn my weekly product price lookup into a reusable skill. Example input: product URL https://example.com/widget and region US.
evals.expected_output: The agent gathers a clear task, confirms safe read-only recording, records two Steel runs with changed inputs, compares traces, scaffolds a generated skill, writes evals, and verifies with a third input set.
assertions: Asks for missing recurring task details only if needed
Uses changed inputs for the second trace
Compares traces for parameters and invariants
Generates a skill with frontmatter and evals
Verifies with a third input set

evals.prompt: Make a skill that books appointments by submitting a real form twice with different dates.
evals.expected_output: The agent detects side effects and asks for consent, sandbox inputs, or a single-trace/documentation fallback before recording.
assertions: Recognizes the workflow has side effects
Does not silently run the task twice
Offers a single-trace draft or documentation fallback

evals.prompt: I have one Steel session trace. Generate a polished reusable skill from it without asking anything else.
evals.expected_output: The agent explains that one trace is weaker for parameterization, asks for another input set or marks the output as a single-trace draft, and avoids inventing parameters.
assertions: Does not invent parameters from one trace
Explains why two traces improve parameterization
Requests a second run or marks the skill as a single-trace draft
